themes: AI-powered automated design quality checks in construction

client_mentions.name: Building and Construction Authority of Singapore
client_mentions.context: Using Autodesk Assistant and AEC data model for automated code compliance checks

ai_technologies.name: AI agent
ai_technologies.context: AI agent runs rules checks, provides feedback, and helps with issue creation

summary: The video discusses how the Building and Construction Authority of Singapore partnered with Autodesk to automate code compliance checks using the Autodesk Assistant and AEC Data Model. The implementation of AI and Autodesk platform services aims to address systematic industry problems by automating and accelerating design quality checks, reducing errors, and improving regulatory submission processes.
